system.description:
His family has controlled the docks for many generations. They quietly destroy competition, and get lucrative city contracts to re-develop blighted areas if the money slows down. Graceful, educated, and pleasant, he is ruthless as barbed steel under a cultured veneer. He is proud of his estate's gardens.

Competition doesn't like being crippled. He often hires outsiders for the dirtiest work, and his victims often hire outsiders to get revenge.
